full_text:
Zheng Bao
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Bao. Bandit leader, he tried to force Liu Ye into service. Murdered by Liu Ye. Zheng Bao lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
